quality_notes: Use 4 to 7 clean hashtags at the end.
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
Most engineers think agents are always the answer 🤖.
But I was wrong - the hard part is not building agents, it's deciding when you don't need them 🤔.

If a task requires structured steps, then consider using traditional software 📝.

When knowledge is not enough, then consider tools 🛠️.

1️⃣ Tools need agents to take actions

I finally understood that simplicity matters 🙏.
If a task is open-ended, then start with a single-agent approach before moving to multi-agent 🤝.

Use the simplest architecture that works, whether it's traditional software, RAG, or an agent 📈.

💬 What do you use:
Structured software
RAG for knowledge
Single-agent #ScaleEngineering #SystemDesign #SystemDesign #SystemDesign #SoftwareArchitecture
